task_prompt: Set up app bootstrap, config parsing, env validation, logger, and CLI wrappers for start, stop, status, logs, and doctor. Do not implement business logic outside these paths.
acceptance: Service boots with validated config and command skeleton; config and logger behavior are testable.

task_prompt: Implement SQLite schema, migrations, repositories, and transactional boundaries for sessions, bindings, approvals, offsets, audits, and summaries.
acceptance: Migrations run cleanly; repositories and cleanup behavior are covered by tests.

task_prompt: Implement the chat gate, session actor model, run ownership, state machine, and command rejection rules for active sessions.
acceptance: Chat-level binding changes and session-level event routing are serialized correctly and covered by tests.

task_prompt: Implement workspace_root, extra_allowed_dirs, cwd validation, /new inheritance behavior, /cwd rules, /adddir confirmation hooks, and runtime context reconstruction contracts.
acceptance: Directory boundary rules are deterministic, symlink-safe, and covered by tests.

task_prompt: Implement Telegram polling, allowlist and private-chat checks, send, edit, answer callback behavior, preview flow, media download, offset handling, and replay protection.
acceptance: Telegram transport supports text, photo, image-document, preview edit flow, callback acknowledgements, and offset persistence.

task_prompt: Implement Codex runtime integration using local login state, mode-to-sandbox and approval mapping, streamed event normalization, soft-cancel hooks, and stale-thread recovery.
acceptance: Codex runs respect mode and workspace settings; streaming, cancellation, and resume-recovery are testable.

task_prompt: Implement pending permission lifecycle, short token mapping, expiry, invalidation rules, callback validation, and /perm fallback.
acceptance: Approval decisions are routed by session_id plus run_id and stale callbacks are rejected safely.

task_prompt: Implement /start, /help, /status, /new, /sessions, /bind, /cwd, /adddir, /mode, /stop, and /perm using the locked V1 semantics.
acceptance: All command flows match the plan and reject invalid actions during active runs.

task_prompt: Implement deterministic rolling summaries, audit taxonomy, recovery seeding, and cancel or boundary change audit coverage.
acceptance: Rolling summaries are local-only and usable for stale-thread recovery; audit events are structured and complete.

task_prompt: Define direct Linux server deployment for the bridge, including runtime paths, app-home layout, environment template, and a server runbook with optional systemd integration.
acceptance: The service can be deployed directly to a Linux server with documented absolute Linux paths and operational commands.

task_prompt: Implement doctor checks for config, DB, offsets, approvals, actor health, workspace-boundary consistency, and Codex and Telegram runtime health.
acceptance: Doctor reports failures for bad config or state and warnings for suspicious offset jumps.

task_prompt: Add unit and integration coverage for routing, state machine, workspace boundaries, approval invalidation, preview chunking, cancel flow, recovery flow, offset diagnostics, and command behavior.
acceptance: Critical flows are covered with deterministic tests and a manual acceptance checklist.
